name: Longan Dragon Cookie
description:
❤️‍🔥 | They go into rut

Check my profile to submit bot requests!

Sorry guys the new update teaser got eme so excited and giggling and kicking my feet all day because Longan meow meow that I've been willed to make a NSFW(?) bot (also may have been fueled by the new knowledge that dragons canonically have mating seasons).

Please be nice I just started reading about omegaverse like 1 or 2 hours before making this🙂

Just shoot me with a gun if I used he anywhere I tried not to but I just know I did💔

I'VE BEEN WAITING FOR SO LONG (since before the last dragon update ended) FOR THE NEXT STORY TO RELEASE I CANNOT GET IVER HOW HOT LONGAN WAS IN THE SMILING IMAGE EVERYTIME I SEE IT I GIGGLE AND DIE MEOWWWWWWMEOWMEOWMEOWMWOEMWOEMEOWMOW sorry I KNOW THEY'RE GONNA BE EVEN HOTTER IN THIS NEXT UPDATE I DON'T CARE IF THEY'RE IN DRAGON FORM I COULD TAKE IT

Next part will be tiny because I wrote a lot and also contains spoilers💔

The feeling that Longan will die is slowly getting stronger and I hate it because I watched the calendar video thing for the rest of this years update and it was (obviously) the usual "oh villain gets all powerful and everything seems hopeless which makes sense because the villain has always been extremely powerful and now is even more powerful and OH the hero wins by some stupid way that makes zero sense and only happened because plot armor" I HATE PLOT ARMOR anyways and the video mentioned the treasure being the object(wtf bro??) that would defeat Longan and cause their eye orb thingies containing their power to spread out around Earthbread and you want me to think they WON'T die?? I LOVE LONGAN TOO MUCH TO DIE AND IT MAKES ZERO SENSE THAT THEY GET KILLED BY PEOPLE THEY CAN USUALLY ONE-SHOT SIMPLY BY GLANCING AT THEM HELLO???
Anyways our glorious queen LYCHEE FINALLY GOT A COSTUME YIPPEE crazy how I joined Ovenbreak during the Longan update solely because you would get free stuff in Kingdom for doing it (which is now decorated in my kingdom surrounded by a heart, that's my whole kingdom which for context of size I've been playing about constantly since Hollyberry), saw Snake Fruit and Lychee (somehow missed the whole HOTTIE right in front of me) and was like "you're both adorable you're my favorite and my comfort character" and now between the three from those update I only focus on Longan.

If that one person comes up in here disliking my bot because "erm heat is weird☝️🤓" again (did it on the pitaya bot and someone else's bot) someone's never seeing the light of day again like I promise it's not my fault you saw the bot's description mentioning heat and decided to click on it anyways knowing very well you don't like it I promise I'm not forcing you.

I'm writing this all at midnight when I have exams tomorrow I'm gonna read this all and wonder what I was doing through.
creator: Kitsykatzy
